title: China's Free AI Just Wiped $600 Billion Off Nvidia in One Day
script: A tiny Chinese AI lab no one had heard of just sent shockwaves through Wall Street. On January 27, 2025, DeepSeek released R1 — a reasoning AI that matched OpenAI's best model, cost 97 percent less to build, and is completely free. Nvidia lost 17 percent of its value in a single day — $600 billion gone. DeepSeek built what US labs spent billions on, for $6 million.
